mapper.select: SELECT id, type_id, value_code, value_name, parent_code, level, sort_order, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag FROM lookup_values WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND delete_flag = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order

WITH RECURSIVE value_tree AS ( -- Base case: root nodes SELECT id, type_id, value_code, value_name, parent_code, level, sort_order, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag FROM lookup_values WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND parent_code IS NULL AND delete_flag = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UNION ALL
-- Recursive case: child nodes SELECT v.id, v.type_id, v.value_code, v.value_name, v.parent_code, v.level, v.sort_order, v.status, v.created_by, v.created_time, v.updated_by, v.updated_time, v.delete_flag FROM lookup_values v INNER JOIN value_tree vt ON v.parent_code = vt.value_code WHERE v.delete_flag = 0 AND v.status = 'ACTIVE' ) SELECT * FROM value_tree ORDER BY level, sort_order

SELECT id, type_id, value_code, value_name, parent_code, level, sort_order, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag FROM lookup_values WHERE parent_code = #{parentCode} AND delete_flag = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order
